Class AbstractOperationPO

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.init.AbstractPO
de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.init.AbstractOperationPO
All Implemented Interfaces:
IPersistablePO, ProofOblInput
Direct Known Subclasses:
AbstractInfFlowPO, FunctionalOperationContractPO, ProgramMethodPO
public abstract class AbstractOperationPO extends AbstractPO

This abstract implementation of ProofOblInput extends the functionality of AbstractPO to execute some code within a try catch block.

The generated Sequent has the following form: 


==>
<generalAssumptions> &
<preconditions>
->
<updatesToStoreInitialValues>
<modalityStart>
exc=null;
try {
  <customCode>
} catch (java.lang.Throwable e) {
   exc = e
}
<modalityEnd>
(exc = null & <postconditions > & <optionalUninterpretedPredicate>)

If isAddUninterpretedPredicate() an uninterpreted predicate is added to the postcondition which contains the heap and all parameters as argument. This predicate can be used to filter out invalid execution paths because its branches are closed while still open branches contains valid execution paths.

    static JTerm
    addAdditionalUninterpretedPredicateIfRequired(Services services, JTerm term, ImmutableList<LocationVariable> variablesToProtect, JTerm exceptionVar)
    This method adds the uninterpreted predicate to the given JTerm if the used ProofOblInput is an instance of AbstractOperationPO and isAddUninterpretedPredicate() is true.

    • AbstractOperationPO

      protected AbstractOperationPO(InitConfig initConfig, String name)
      Constructor.
      Parameters:
      initConfig - The InitConfig to use.
      name - The name to use.

    • AbstractOperationPO

      protected AbstractOperationPO(InitConfig initConfig, String name, boolean addUninterpretedPredicate, boolean addSymbolicExecutionLabel)
      Constructor.
      Parameters:
      initConfig - The InitConfig to use.
      name - he name to use.
      addUninterpretedPredicate - true postcondition contains uninterpreted predicate, false uninterpreted predicate is not contained in postcondition.
      addSymbolicExecutionLabel - true to add the SymbolicExecutionTermLabel to the modality, false to not label the modality.

  • Method Details

    • getUninterpretedPredicate

      public static JTerm getUninterpretedPredicate(Proof proof)
      Returns the uninterpreted predicate used in the given Proof if available.
      Parameters:
      proof - The Proof to get its uninterpreted predicate.
      Returns:
      The uninterpreted predicate or null if not used.

    • getAdditionalUninterpretedPredicates

      public static Set<JTerm> getAdditionalUninterpretedPredicates(Proof proof)
      Returns the uninterpreted predicate used in the given Proof if available.
      Parameters:
      proof - The Proof to get its uninterpreted predicate.
      Returns:
      The uninterpreted predicate or null if not used.

    • addUninterpretedPredicateIfRequired

      public static JTerm addUninterpretedPredicateIfRequired(Services services, JTerm term)
      This method adds the uninterpreted predicate to the given JTerm if the used ProofOblInput is an instance of AbstractOperationPO and isAddUninterpretedPredicate() is true. Otherwise the given JTerm is returned.
      Parameters:
      services - The Services which provides the Proof and its ProofOblInput.
      term - The JTerm to modify.
      Returns:
      The modified or original JTerm.

    • addAdditionalUninterpretedPredicateIfRequired

      public static JTerm addAdditionalUninterpretedPredicateIfRequired(Services services, JTerm term, ImmutableList<LocationVariable> variablesToProtect, JTerm exceptionVar)
      This method adds the uninterpreted predicate to the given JTerm if the used ProofOblInput is an instance of AbstractOperationPO and isAddUninterpretedPredicate() is true. Otherwise the given JTerm is returned.
      Parameters:
      services - The Services which provides the Proof and its ProofOblInput.
      term - The JTerm to modify.
      variablesToProtect - LocationVariables to protect.
      exceptionVar - The exception variable to protect.
      Returns:
      The modified or original JTerm.

    • isAddUninterpretedPredicate

      public static boolean isAddUninterpretedPredicate(Configuration properties)
      Checks if the "addUninterpretedPredicate" value is set in the given Properties.
      Parameters:
      properties - The Properties to read value from.
      Returns:
      true is set, false is not set.

    • createLoaderConfig

      public Configuration createLoaderConfig()
      This method is called by a ProofSaver to store the proof specific settings in the given Properties. The stored settings have to contain all information required to instantiate the proof obligation again and this instance should create the same Sequent (if code and specifications are unchanged).
      Specified by:
      createLoaderConfig in interface IPersistablePO
      Overrides:
      createLoaderConfig in class AbstractPO
      Returns:

    • modifyPostTerm

      protected JTerm modifyPostTerm(Services proofServices, ProgramVariable self, JTerm post)
      Modifies the post condition with help of POExtension.modifyPostTerm(AbstractOperationPO, InitConfig, Services, ProgramVariable, JTerm).
      Parameters:
      proofServices - The Services to use.
      self -
      post - The post condition to modify.
      Returns:
      The modified post condition or the original one if no modifications were performed.

    • isMakeNamesUnique

      protected boolean isMakeNamesUnique()
      Checks if self variable, exception variable, result variable and method call arguments should be renamed to make sure that their names are unique in the whole KeY application.
      Returns:
      true use unique names, false use original names even if they are not unique in whole KeY application.

      protected abstract IProgramMethod getProgramMethod()
      Returns the IProgramMethod to call.
      Returns:
      The IProgramMethod to call.

    • buildOperationBlocks

      protected abstract ImmutableList<StatementBlock> buildOperationBlocks(ImmutableList<LocationVariable> formalParVars, ProgramVariable selfVar, ProgramVariable resultVar, Services services)
      Builds the code to execute in different statement blocks. 1. code to execute before the try block 2. code to execute in the try block 3. code to execute in the catch block 4. code to execute in the finally block
      Parameters:
      formalParVars - Arguments from formal parameters for method call.
      selfVar - The self variable.
      resultVar - The result variable.
      services - services instance
      Returns:
      operation blocks as statement blocks

    • buildFreePre

      protected JTerm buildFreePre(LocationVariable selfVar, KeYJavaType selfKJT, ImmutableList<LocationVariable> paramVars, List<LocationVariable> heaps, Services services)
      Builds the "general assumption".
      Parameters:
      selfVar - The self variable.
      selfKJT - The KeYJavaType of the self variable.
      paramVars - The parameters ProgramVariables.
      heaps - The heaps.
      services - The services instance.
      Returns:
      The JTerm containing the general assumptions.

      protected abstract JTerm getPre(List<LocationVariable> modifiableHeaps, LocationVariable selfVar, ImmutableList<LocationVariable> paramVars, Map<LocationVariable, LocationVariable> atPreVars, Services services)
      Creates the precondition.
      Parameters:
      modifiableHeaps - The heaps.
      selfVar - The self variable.
      paramVars - The parameters ProgramVariables.
      atPreVars - Mapping of LocationVariable to the LocationVariable which contains the initial value.
      services - The Services to use.
      Returns:
      The JTerm representing the precondition.

    • buildFrameClause

      protected abstract JTerm buildFrameClause(List<LocationVariable> modifiableHeaps, Map<JTerm,JTerm> heapToAtPre, LocationVariable selfVar, ImmutableList<LocationVariable> paramVars, Services services)
      Builds the frame clause including the modifiable clause.
      Parameters:
      modifiableHeaps - a non-empty list of heaps variables
      heapToAtPre - The previous heap before execution.
      selfVar - The self variable.
      paramVars - The parameters ProgramVariables.
      services - services instance
      Returns:
      The created JTerm representing the frame clause.

    • buildProgramTerm

      protected JTerm buildProgramTerm(ImmutableList<LocationVariable> paramVars, ImmutableList<LocationVariable> formalParamVars, LocationVariable selfVar, LocationVariable resultVar, LocationVariable exceptionVar, Map<LocationVariable, LocationVariable> atPreVars, JTerm postTerm, ImmutableList<StatementBlock> sb, Services services)
      Creates the JTerm which contains the modality including the complete program to execute.
      Parameters:
      paramVars - Formal parameters of method call.
      formalParamVars - Arguments from formal parameters for method call.
      selfVar - The self variable.
      resultVar - The result variable.
      exceptionVar - The LocationVariable used to store caught exceptions.
      atPreVars - Mapping of LocationVariable to the LocationVariable which contains the initial value.
      postTerm - The post condition.
      sb - The StatementBlock to execute in try block.
      services - services instance.
      Returns:
      The created JTerm.

    • buildJavaBlock

      protected JavaBlock buildJavaBlock(ImmutableList<LocationVariable> formalParVars, ProgramVariable selfVar, ProgramVariable resultVar, ProgramVariable exceptionVar, boolean transaction, ImmutableList<StatementBlock> sb)
      Creates the try catch block to execute.
      Parameters:
      formalParVars - Arguments from formal parameters for method call.
      selfVar - The self variable.
      resultVar - The result variable.
      exceptionVar - The ProgramVariable used to store caught exceptions.
      transaction - Transaction flag.
      sb - The StatementBlocks to execute.
      Returns:
      The created JavaBlock which contains the try catch block.
